title: Middle East war de-escalation rhetoric drove a sharp reversal in crude and a risk-on bounce
summary: Reuters reported oil sank 7% after Trump said the war could be over soon; Reuters also reported Asian stocks rebounded as oil fell, while Iran still said it would decide when the war ends and would keep blocking the Strait of Hormuz
lastCheckSourceQuality: high for the price/action headline and policy comments (reuters, multi-article corroboration); lower on durability because the geopolitical end-state remains unresolved
